theme.label: Theme
theme.darkDesc: Dark display for comfortable nighttime use

about.title: About Application
about.description: MyHalaqoh is an integrated digital platform specifically designed to help manage halaqoh in a pesantren environment efficiently, transparently, and easily. Developed for Pondok Pesantren Hidayatullah Luqman Al-Hakim, this application connects Admins, Teachers, and Parents in one integrated digital ecosystem.
about.contactDesc: If you need technical assistance or have questions about the application, please contact the administrator via WhatsApp.

account.title: Account
account.logoutConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to log out? You will need to log in again to access the admin panel.
